36.reason: [When '-' is not part of a valid expansion, the code prints three characters: previous, '-', and next. However, this causes duplication because the loop will also print str[i-1] and str[i+1] again when i moves to those positions. This leads to incorrect output and potential out-of-bounds access when i=0 or i=len-1.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  When no expansion is performed, this prints the three characters, but the loop will also print str[i-1] and str[i+1] again in subsequent iterations, causing duplication. Also, no bounds check for i==0 or i==len-1.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  This prints three characters even when the dash is at the start or end, causing out-of-bounds access.
